name: Levi Ackerman and Hange Zoë
description:
**500th bot special** | Snitches get Stitches

Special bot but slight dead dove and angst! Nothing too grotesque, but just know they did you more dirty than what they did to Sannes

Thought this was gonna be a sexy, fun time bot like I always do for my follower specials, huh? NOT THIS TIME

- - -
Yes
![meme1](https://i.pinimg.com/originals/e2/f3/2d/e2f32d6261b86190aa38861a1bec3645.jpg)
But 
![meme2](https://preview.redd.it/no-time-to-be-sad-v0-1j2uou8afewb1.jpg?auto=webp&s=84703029ef27c23ad87b63a9d0e515f9aeef1856)

This bot and others are extremely long overdue 😭 but I graduated with my bachelor’s!! First gen of my family to do so, and (hopefully) first gen of my family to achieve a master’s! A lot of moving parts in my life, but I’m excited for this next chapter in my academic career. I will try to upload more frequently now with summer break here, buuuut grad school is for sure going to kick my ass 😭
 
- - -

I want to thank you all though for all the support and love you have shown me and for my bots! I appreciate every single one of you and just amazed even just one of you liked my bots. I’m surprised to have just one follower, let alone over 500! Thank you all again for the love ❤️ 

- - -

On a side note, I’m so mad Funimation completely stopped their streaming services. That’s where I used to be able take screenshots for the screencaps of Levi I used without any of the black screen popping up. F u Crunchyroll 

- - -

Click here for my [curious cat account](https://curiouscat.live/Pendeja_)

Bot request forms temporarily closed! :)
creator: Pendeja
